name: Opik
description: Export OpenClaw LLM traces to Opik

enabled.label: Tracing Enabled
enabled.help: Enable Opik trace export while the plugin is loaded.

apiKey.label: Opik API Key
apiKey.help: Optional for local deployments; defaults to OPIK_API_KEY.

apiUrl.label: Opik API URL
apiUrl.help: Defaults to OPIK_URL_OVERRIDE when not set.

tags.label: Default Tags
tags.help: List of tags applied to every created trace.

staleTraceCleanupEnabled.label: Stale Cleanup Enabled
staleTraceCleanupEnabled.help: When enabled, traces inactive longer than the timeout are force-closed.

staleTraceTimeoutMs.label: Stale Timeout (ms)
staleTraceTimeoutMs.help: Inactivity window before stale traces are force-closed. Default is 300000.

staleSweepIntervalMs.label: Stale Sweep Interval (ms)
staleSweepIntervalMs.help: How often stale traces are scanned. Default is 60000.

flushRetryCount.label: Flush Retry Count
flushRetryCount.help: Number of retry attempts after a failed flush. Default is 2.

flushRetryBaseDelayMs.label: Flush Retry Base Delay (ms)
flushRetryBaseDelayMs.help: Base delay for exponential flush retry backoff. Default is 250.
